meta.title: Rescue Info
meta.description: Fast access to vehicle rescue cards and safety resources

home.title: Find Your Vehicle Rescue Card
home.subtitle: Quick access to rescue cards (Rettungskarten) for first responders and car owners

footer.disclaimer: Not an official emergency service. Sources linked on each page.

search.noResults: No rescue cards found for this vehicle.

about.title: About Rescue Info
about.intro: Rescue Info is an independent, non-commercial open-source project that makes vehicle rescue cards (Rettungskarten) easily accessible for car owners and first responders in Switzerland.
about.disclaimer: This platform is not affiliated with any car manufacturer, rescue organization, or government body. Rescue cards are sourced from publicly available manufacturer and aggregator resources. We do not guarantee completeness or accuracy. This platform is not a substitute for professional emergency training.
about.openSource: This project is open-source and licensed under GPL-3.0.

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.privacyContent: This website does not collect personal data. No user accounts are required. No cookies are used for tracking purposes.
legal.licenseContent: This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0.
legal.disclaimerContent: The information provided on this platform is for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information up to date and correct, we make no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of the information. Rescue cards are sourced from publicly available resources and may not reflect the latest updates from manufacturers.

support.title: Support This Project
support.intro: Rescue Info is a free, open-source project. If you find it useful, you can support its development and hosting costs.

safety.title: Safety Resources
safety.intro: Curated safety information and resources for Switzerland. Every piece of information links to its original source.

contribute.title: Contribute a Rescue Card
contribute.intro: Help expand our database by uploading rescue cards that are not yet available on this platform.
contribute.success: Thank you! Your submission will be reviewed by a moderator.
contribute.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
